title: chrono-zig
description: A full-featured date and time library for the Zig programming language — a port of Rust's battle-tested Chrono crate. Supports timezone-aware DateTimes, strftime-inspired formatting, DST handling, and IANA timezone data via a companion package. Listed on Zigistry, the official Zig package registry.

title: zig-pkg-index
description: A clean, beautiful package index web UI for the Zig ecosystem. Helps developers discover, browse, and explore Zig packages in a well-designed interface — filling a gap in the young but fast-growing Zig tooling landscape.

title: book-finder
description: A JavaScript library and tool that searches the internet for books by title, author, or ISBN. A practical utility for readers and developers that wraps various book APIs into a simple, unified interface.

title: LeetCode Solutions
description: A carefully curated collection of LeetCode problem solutions covering Data Structures, Algorithms, Dynamic Programming, Graph Theory, and more — each written with clean, readable, and well-commented code in Java.

title: Resume Template Download Website
description: A full-stack web application for browsing and downloading professional resume templates as PPTX files. Features template previews, categorized listings, and seamless download functionality with a clean, modern interface.
